evidence.note: Google's DORA State of DevOps research names the DevOps and CI/CD audience and its delivery practices directly.
Google's SRE book defines the site-reliability / platform-engineering role this profile targets.
Stack Overflow's 2024 technology results rank Docker and Kubernetes among the most-used and most-admired tools for operations work.
HashiCorp's Terraform intro describes infrastructure-as-code across cloud providers, matching the recommended Terraform and Azure CLI MCP servers.
